nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 苏拉威西岛
nodes.summary: 苏拉威西岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联31种鸟类，包括菲律宾冢雉、蓝胸鹑、白喉林鸽等31种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸡鸠属
nodes.summary: 鸡鸠属（Gallicolumba）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Sulawesi ground dove、Mindoro bleeding-heart、Negros bleeding-heart pigeon等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sulawesi ground dove
nodes.summary: Sulawesi ground dove（Gallicolumba tristigmata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Sulawesi ground dove。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sulawesi ground dove
nodes.summary: The Sulawesi ground dove (Gallicolumba tristigmata), also known as the yellow-breasted ground dove, is a medium-sized (approximately 35 cm), ground-dwelling dove. It is mostly olive-brown with a golden forehead, iridescent bluish-green crown and nape, purple patch on the side of the neck, yellow breast, dark brown tail, white underparts, and red legs. Both sexes are similar. An Indonesian endemic, this elusive species is distributed in primary rainforests of Sulawesi in Wallacea. The Sulawesi ground dove is a terrestrial bird. Its diet consists mainly of seeds and fallen fruits. The female lays a single white egg. The Sulawesi ground dove is evaluated as of least concern on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet
